# QC_lattice_H (optional)

This repo supports interoperability with **ariannacrippa/QC_lattice_H**.

If you want it vendored as a git submodule:

```bash
git submodule add https://github.com/ariannacrippa/QC_lattice_H.git third_party/QC_lattice_H
```

Alternatively, install it in your env and the adapters will detect it.
